summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for emergentintegrations to OpenAI SDK migration. All specified authentication endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - backend healthy with database connected
POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials (demo@familycareorganizer.com / Demo2026!) - returns token
POST /api/auth/apple with user_id - creates user and returns token
POST /api/auth/apple with empty user_id - returns 400 error as expected
GET /api/auth/me with token - returns user data
POST /api/auth/login with empty body - returns clear 422 error with 'Missing required fields: email, password'
POST /api/auth/google with google_user_id and email - works correctly
